# aapt2: /Users/shawwalters/Library/Android/sdk/build-tools/36.0.0/aapt2

  E: input-method (line=15)
    A: http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android:supportsSwitchingToNextInputMethod(0x010103eb)=true
      E: subtype (line=20)
        A: http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android:label(0x01010001)=@0x7f0f0057
